title: Discipline
description: Sport sub-variant / competition format. One Sport hasMany Disciplines (football has 11v11, futsal, 5v5). Carries `tenant_id` NULLABLE — NULL = platform-scoped, non-null = tenant custom (Enterprise). Also `sport_id` FK — the parent Sport must be either platform-seeded OR same-tenant (cross-tenant parent refused). Slug IMMUTABLE post-create; sport_id IMMUTABLE post-create; is_platform_seeded IMMUTABLE. NEVER application_id / region_id / branch_id / organization_id / scope_node_id / parent_id.

x-eloquent.relations_note: belongsTo sports::Sport via sport_id (RESTRICT). hasMany positions::Position via positions.discipline_id (RESTRICT). belongsTo tenancy::Tenant via tenant_id (CASCADE, nullable).

x-database.description: Second-level table. Unique on (sport_id, slug) partial. The parent Sport's tenant_id + this Discipline's tenant_id are tightly coupled — the observer refuses a tenant custom Discipline hanging off another tenant's custom Sport (CROSS_TENANT_REGISTRY_REFERENCE).

tenant_id.description: NULL = platform-scoped. Non-null = tenant custom. Same rules as Sport.tenant_id.

sport_id.description: The parent Sport. RESTRICT: a Sport with active Disciplines cannot be deleted. IMMUTABLE post-create (PARENT_REFERENCE_IMMUTABLE).

name.description: Display name (e.g. '11-a-side football', 'Futsal', '5-a-side football', 'FIBA 5v5', '3x3 Streetball'). Localizable.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Convention: prefix with the parent sport's slug (e.g. `football_11v11`, `basketball_5v5`) so slugs are self-describing when read out of context. Regex `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$`. IMMUTABLE post-create.

format_type.description: Enum: team / individual / relay / pairs / squads. Advisory — shapes downstream Team.player_count validation.

player_count_min.description: Advisory minimum active players (11 for 11v11 football). 1-500.

player_count_max.description: Advisory maximum active players + substitutes (typically ~18 for 11v11 football including subs). 1-500.

session_duration_default_minutes.description: Advisory default session duration (90 for football, 40-48 for basketball, 60 for tennis). Shapes downstream Session-scheduling defaults.

sort_order.description: Ascending sort within the parent Sport.

indexes.name: disciplines_sport_slug_unique
indexes.description: One live slug per parent Sport.

indexes.name: disciplines_tenant_slug_idx
indexes.description: Secondary lookup for the resolver + collision-check queries.

indexes.name: disciplines_picker_idx
indexes.description: Fast scan for the tenant discipline picker under a Sport.

accepts: slug (case-insensitive within the caller's merged catalog for a resolved parent Sport)

invariants: slug matches `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$` AND not in reserved list.
player_count_min <= player_count_max when both set; each 1..500.
Parent Sport must be same-tenant OR platform-seeded (CROSS_TENANT_REGISTRY_REFERENCE 422).
Deactivation refuses when active Positions exist (DISCIPLINE_HAS_ACTIVE_POSITIONS 409).
Deactivation refuses when downstream references exist (DISCIPLINE_REFERENCE_IN_USE 409).
Reactivation refuses when parent Sport is is_active=false.
